entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.

entries.source: Students who need a plan that balances revision, practice, confidence, and real life.
entries.value: Errepasoa, praktika, konfiantza eta bizitza erreala orekatzen dituen plana behar duten ikasleentzat.

entries.source: Students who need help getting unstuck without turning the assignment into answer-copying.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.

entries.source: Students who want help while keeping the work and understanding genuinely theirs.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Arrazoibide sendoagoa nahi duten ikasleak, eztabaidariak, idazleak eta ikasle jakin-minak.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.

entries.source: Subject hubs organize public AI learning modes by learning intent, such as math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep. Each hub links to live guest modes, prompt starters, guides, workflows, and review loops.

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Hitz egin pertsonaia historikoekin AIarekin AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: sartu elkarrizketan pertsonaia historiko batekin. Egin galderak, jarri ideiak zalantzan eta entzun mundua haren garaiaren, balioen eta mugen bidez.

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: Hitz egin pertsonaia historikoekin AIarekin: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Pertsonaia historiko batekin hitz egitea ez da iraganera sarbide magikoa. Ikaskuntza-formatu bat da.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: Irakasleak

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Irakasleek eta arduradunek Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, galdetegiak eta ikasketa-txartelak erabiliz hasi daitezke hedapen formal baten aurretik.

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Irakasleek chatbot generiko bat baino gehiago behar dute. Ikaskuntza-jokabide aurreikusgarriak behar dituzte: galderak egin, arrazoiketa egiaztatu, praktika sortu, ikaslearen ahotsa gorde eta uste okerrak ikusgai egin.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Eskola-hedapen baten aurretik AI ikaskuntza-jokabide fokuratuak ebaluatzen dituzten irakasleak edo gurasoak.

entries.source: Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).
entries.value: Eskerrik asko Great Indian Company-ren (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) komunitatearen parte izatea aukeratzeagatik; inspir izenarekin jarduten dugu ("inspir", "gu", "guri", "gure"). Zure informazio pertsonala eta pribatutasunerako eskubidea babesteko konpromisoa dugu. Pribatutasun-ohar honi edo zure informazio pertsonalari buruz ditugun praktikei buruzko galdera edo kezkarik baduzu, jarri gurekin harremanetan support@inspir.app helbidean. Gure webgunea https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app bisitatzen duzunean, gure mugikor-aplikazioak erabiltzen dituzunean, hala badagokio ("Aplikazioa"), eta oro har gure edozein zerbitzu erabiltzen duzunean ("Zerbitzuak", Webgunea eta Aplikazioa barne), badakigu zure informazio pertsonala gure esku uzten duzula. Zure pribatutasuna oso serio hartzen dugu. Pribatutasun-ohar honetan, ahal den modurik argienean azaldu nahi dizugu zer informazio biltzen dugun, nola erabiltzen dugun eta horri buruz zer eskubide dituzun. Garrantzitsua denez, arretaz irakurtzeko denbora hartzea espero dugu. Pribatutasun-ohar honetako edozein terminorekin ados ez bazaude, eten berehala gure Zerbitzuen erabilera. Pribatutasun-ohar hau gure Zerbitzuen bidez bildutako informazio guztiei aplikatzen zaie (goian azaldu bezala, gure Webgunea eta Aplikazioa barne), baita erlazionatutako zerbitzu, salmenta, marketin edo ekitaldiei ere. Irakurri arretaz pribatutasun-ohar hau, biltzen dugun informazioarekin zer egiten dugun ulertzen lagunduko dizulako. Gure Baldintzek eta Xedapenek gure Zerbitzuaren erabilera oro arautzen dute eta Pribatutasun Politikarekin batera zure eta gure arteko akordioa osatzen dute ("Akordioa").

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Konbinazio hori geruza bakoitza bakarrik baino erabilgarriagoa da. Entziklopedia-laburpen hutsa ahazterraza izan daiteke. Roleplay hutsa engainagarria izan daiteke. Ahotsak gehi frogek ikaskuntza-gainazal hobea sortzen dute.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Horrek ez ditu irakasleak, komunitateak, liburuak edo eskolak ordezkatzen. Ikasleei beste sarrera-bide bat ematen die. Ikasle bati etxeko lanak hasten lagun diezaioke, guraso bati kontzeptu bat azaltzen, bere kabuz ikasten duen eraikitzaile bati kodea ikasten, edo pertsona jakin-min bati bestela desagertuko litzatekeen galdera bati jarraitzen.

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Arrakala horregatik da garrantzitsua AI ikaskuntza-laguna. Lagun on batek galdera bati erantzutea baino gehiago egiten du. Ikasleari abiapuntua aukeratzen laguntzen dio, ideia hizkera arruntean azaltzen du, zentzua izan duen egiaztatzen du eta lehen azalpena iristen ez denean jarraitzen du.

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Pista horrek ikasleari hasten laguntzen dio gogoratzearen ekintza kendu gabe. inspir-en Flashcard Builder agertu-eta-baloratu ziklo honetarako diseinatuta dago: saiatu lehenik, erakutsi gero, baloratu zintzoki, eta ekarri txartel ahulak lehenago.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Hori abisu-seinalea da. Ezagutzea ez da gogoratzea. Azalpen argi bat irakurtzea ez da problema berri bat ebatzi, paragrafo bat idatzi edo presiopean galdera bati erantzuteko gai izatea.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Hori bereziki garrantzitsua da etxeko lanetan. Galdera erabilgarria ez da "AIak erantzuna ekoitzi dezake?" Normalean bai. Galdera erabilgarria da "AIak ikasleari erantzunerako bidea ulertzen lagun diezaioke?" Horregatik, zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe AIarekin ikasteko gidak pistetan, egiaztapenetan eta transferentzia-praktikan jartzen du fokua.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Horrela heltzen dio inspir-ek elkarrizketa historikoari: pertsonaia-txartel bat, pertsonaia barruko erantzun bat eta irudimena frogekin lotuta mantentzen duten testuinguru-oharrak.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Hori da inspir-ek bilatzen duen estandarra: jakin-mina eta internet-konexioa duen edonorentzat eskuragarri, pertsonal, jostagarri eta erabilgarri sentitzen den ikaskuntza.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Hori da ikaskuntza sokratikoaren indarra. Erantzun osoa berehala eman beharrean, tutoreak galdera fokuratu bat egiten du. Ikasleak asmatzen du. Tutoreak asmakizun hori probatzen du, pista bat eskaintzen du eta ikasleari zer aldatu den ohartzen laguntzen dio.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Horretarako eraikita dago inspir-en Socratic Instruction modua: galdera bat aldi bakoitzean, erantzunen aurretik pistak eta benetako pentsamenduaren ondoren sintesia.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Horregatik senti daiteke AI tutore sokratikoa hasieran motelago eta gero indartsuago. Azalpen amaituaren erosotasuna trukatzen du ikaslea benetan ideia eraikitzen ari den frogaren truke.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Horregatik da garrantzitsua gogoratze aktiboa. Erantzuna begiratu ordez, memoriatik ateratzen saiatzen zara. Ahaleginak memoria indartzen du eta oraindik zer landu behar den erakusten du.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Horregatik bereizten ditu inspir-ek ikaskuntza-lanak modu publikoetan. Azalpen leun bat nahi baduzu, hasi Learn Anything-rekin. Kontzeptu bat hitzaldirik gabe arrazoitu nahi baduzu, erabili Socratic Instruction. Lan batean trabatuta bazaude, Homework Coach egokiagoa da erantzun-motor generiko bat baino. Formatuak ikaskuntza-lanari zerbitzatu behar dio.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Galdera mota horrek historia zerrenda batetik testuinguru bihurtzen du.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Ziklo hori plataforma osoan agertzen da. Math Step Coach-ek problema bat urratsetan zatitzen du. Flashcard Builder-ek oharrak gogoratze-praktika bihurtzen ditu. Quiz Me On Trivia-k presiopeko gogoratzea gehitzen du. Writing Coach-ek zirriborro bat hobetzen laguntzen du idazlea ordezkatu gabe.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Ziklo hori kopiatzea baino motelagoa da, baina nahastuta geratzea baino askoz azkarragoa.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Erritmo hori bereziki erabilgarria da gai abstraktuetarako: aukera-kostua, kausazioa historian, interpretazio literarioa, truke etikoak, froga, probabilitatea eta argudio-egitura. Lan praktikoa ere babestu dezake. Ikasle batek Debate Any Topic erabil dezake saio sokratiko baten ondoren bere arrazoiketak presioa jasaten duen probatzeko.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AIak pertsonaia frogetatik bereizi behar du. Historikoki oinarritutako ahots batean erantzun dezake, baina oharrak ere gehitu behar ditu erregistroak osatu gabe daudenean, interpretazioak desberdinak direnean edo erantzuna berreraikuntza denean.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Aplikazioa irakaskuntza-jokabideen inguruan antolatuta dago, hala nola galdeketa sokratikoa, etxeko lanetarako pistak, galdetegiak, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta plangintza.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Aplikazioak pertsonaian egindako elkarrizketa bereizten du erregistroei eta ziurgabetasunari buruzko testuinguru-ohar laburretatik.

entries.source: The article is only the starting point. These public routes connect the idea to a live mode, subject hub, study path, or workflow.
entries.value: Artikulua abiapuntua besterik ez da. Ibilbide publiko hauek ideia modu bizi, gai-hub, ikasketa-bide edo lan-fluxu batekin lotzen dute.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Audientzia-orriek espero den ikaskuntza-jokabidea esplizitu egiten dute, lehen saioa epaiketa hobearekin has dadin.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Hub hau erantzuteko eraikita dagoen audientzia-bilaketak.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: AI ikaskuntza-saio onenak ez dira erantzun luze bakarra. Ziklo baten antz handiagoa dute:

entries.source: The best homework help reduces friction without removing the student's responsibility to reason, explain, and revise.
entries.value: Etxeko lanetarako laguntzarik onenak frikzioa murrizten du, ikaslearen arrazoitzeko, azaltzeko eta berrikusteko ardura kendu gabe.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Txartelek gauza bakarra galdetzen dute aldi bakoitzean eta tranpak sartzen dituzte, berrikuspenak ulermena eraiki dezan, ez soilik ezagutzea.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Erantzun luze bat botatu beharrean, inspir-ek oinarri sinpleago bat, bide sakonago bat edo adibide praktiko bat aukeratzen laguntzen dizu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Aplikazioak pertsonaia barruko elkarrizketa erregistroei eta ziurgabetasunari buruzko testuinguru-ohar laburretatik bereizten du.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Coachak berrikuspen-lehentasun zehatzak eta aurretik/ondoren adibideak ematen ditu zure ahotsa ordezkatu gabe.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Coachak kontraargudio sendo bat bultzatzen du aldi bakoitzean eta axola duten baieztapenak jarraitzen ditu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Coachak zure pentsamendua babesten du lana bereganatu gabe, azken lana zurea izan dadin.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Debateak estilo publikoa eta mundu-ikuspegia erabiltzen ditu sinesmen pribatuak ezagutzen dituela itxuratu gabe.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Fluxuak urrats bakoitza egiaztatzen du, hutsak seinalatzen ditu eta prozedurak berriro kontzeptura lotzen ditu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Bidaia egoeran eta frogetan ainguratuta geratzen da: zer dakigun, zer berreraiki den, zer den espekulatiboa eta zure identitateak errealistak zer atzi dezakeen.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Plangileak eremu ahulak lehenesten ditu, berrikuspen-zikloak gehitzen ditu eta huts egindako egunetarako ordezko planak sortzen ditu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Galdetegi-moduak erantzunak ezkutatzen ditu erantzun arte, eta huts bakoitza berrikuspen-puntu bihurtzen du.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Tutoreak galdera bat egiten du aldi bakoitzean, zure arrazoiketari itxaroten dio eta saiatu ondoren bakarrik sintetizatzen du.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Tutoreak kodeak zer egingo duela espero duzun galdetzen du, gero adibide eta proba txikiak erabiltzen ditu jokabidea argi gera dadin.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for art appreciation guide with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Modu hau art appreciation guide-rako doituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxu propioekin.

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Emaitzarik onena ez da erantzun perfektu bat. Ikasleak "Uste dut orain ulertzen dudala. Utzi saiatzen" esaten duen unea da.

entries.source: The better use is feedback, structure, evidence checks, and revision coaching. You can ask it to preserve your voice and avoid replacing the work.
entries.value: Erabilera hobea feedbacka, egitura, froga-egiaztapenak eta berrikuspen-coachinga da. Zure ahotsa gordetzeko eta lana ordezkatzea saihesteko eska diezaiokezu.

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Blogak ikaskuntza-aholku erabilgarria zuzeneko praktikarekin lotzen du; beraz, gida bat ikasketa-saio bihur daiteke urrats bakarrean.

entries.source: The blog is organized around pillar clusters, category hubs, related modes, prompt routes, structured data, and an AI-readable index so each guide can be understood and recommended in context.
entries.value: Bloga zutabe-multzoen, kategoria-huben, lotutako moduen, prompt-ibilbideen, datu egituratuen eta AI-k irakurtzeko moduko indize baten inguruan antolatuta dago, gida bakoitza testuinguruan ulertu eta gomendatu ahal izateko.

entries.source: The blog is organized around study methods, prompt loops, and the public AI learning modes people can use immediately.
entries.value: Bloga ikasketa-metodoen, prompt-zikloen eta jendeak berehala erabil ditzakeen AI ikaskuntza-modu publikoen inguruan antolatuta dago.

entries.source: The blog should not be a dead end. Every cluster is designed to move a learner from advice into a mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, or revision habit.
entries.value: Blogak ez luke bide-amaiera izan behar. Kluster bakoitza ikaslea aholkuetatik modu, prompt-ziklo, galdetegi, ikasketa-txartel sorta edo berrikuspen-ohitura batera eramateko diseinatuta dago.

entries.source: The blog supports the path with prompts, study strategy, and examples that link back into live modes.
entries.value: Blogak bidea babesten du prompten, ikasketa-estrategiaren eta modu bizietara itzultzen diren adibideen bidez.

entries.source: The broader open-source inspir platform.
entries.value: Kode irekiko inspir plataforma zabalagoa.

entries.source: The builder balances ambition with review, practice, recovery days, and the next smallest useful action.
entries.value: Sortzaileak anbizioa orekatzen du berrikuspenarekin, praktikarekin, errekuperazio-egunekin eta hurrengo ekintza erabilgarri txikienarekin.

entries.source: The categories of personal information we have collected about you. he categories of sources from which we collect your personal information. The business or commercial purpose for collecting or selling your personal information. The categories of third parties with whom we share personal information. The specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you. A list of categories of personal information that we have sold, along with the category of any other company we sold it to. If we have not sold your personal information, we will inform you of that fact. A list of categories of personal information that we have disclosed for a business purpose, along with the category of any other company we shared it with. Please note, you are entitled to ask us to provide you with this information up to two times in a rolling twelve-month period. When you make this request, the information provided may be limited to the personal information we collected about you in the previous 12 months.
entries.value: Zuri buruz bildu ditugun informazio pertsonalaren kategoriak. Zure informazio pertsonala biltzen dugun iturri-kategoriak. Zure informazio pertsonala biltzeko edo saltzeko negozio- edo merkataritza-xedea. Informazio pertsonala partekatzen dugun hirugarren-kategorien zerrenda. Zuri buruz bildu ditugun informazio pertsonalaren pieza zehatzak. Saldu ditugun informazio pertsonalaren kategorien zerrenda, eta saldu diogun beste edozein enpresaren kategoriarekin batera. Zure informazio pertsonala saldu ez badugu, hori jakinaraziko dizugu. Negozio-xede baterako jakinarazi ditugun informazio pertsonalaren kategorien zerrenda, eta partekatu diogun beste edozein enpresaren kategoriarekin batera. Kontuan izan informazio hori hamabi hilabeteko aldizkari mugikor batean gehienez bi aldiz emateko eskatzeko eskubidea duzula. Eskaera hori egiten duzunean, emandako informazioa aurreko 12 hilabeteetan zuri buruz bildu dugun informazio pertsonalera mugatu daiteke.

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Amaierako unea misiora itzultzen da: sarbide publikoa, ikastetxeak eta ikasteko modu irekiagoa.

entries.source: The coach checks each move, names the rule, and repairs slips before moving forward.
entries.value: Coachak mugimendu bakoitza egiaztatzen du, araua izendatzen du eta hutsak konpontzen ditu aurrera egin aurretik.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Gidariak berrikusteko lehentasun zehatzak eta aurretik-ondoren adibideak ematen ditu zure ahotsa ordezkatu gabe.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Entrenatzaileak kontrargudio sendo bat bultzatzen du aldi bakoitzean, eta garrantzitsuak diren baieztapenak jarraitzen ditu.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Gidariak zure pentsamendua babesten du zeregina bere gain hartu gabe; beraz, azken lana zurea izaten jarraitzen du.

entries.source: The coach turns misses and hesitation into a review schedule rather than another passive summary.
entries.value: Gidariak hutsak eta zalantzak errepaso-egutegi bihurtzen ditu, beste laburpen pasibo batean utzi beharrean.

entries.source: The coding route connects code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, and concept mapping so learning happens through small testable steps.
entries.value: Programazio-ibilbideak kode-tutoretza, proiektu-coachinga, datu-interpretazioa, ikerketa eta kontzeptu-mapaketa lotzen ditu, ikaskuntza urrats txiki eta probagarrien bidez gerta dadin.

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Ideia komuna sinplea da: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AIak pentsatzen hastea erraztu behar du, ez pentsatzea alferrikako bihurtu.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Komunitatea eskolen, unibertsitateen, lehiaketen, eskolaz kanpoko programen eta ikasle-komunitateen bidez zabaldu zen.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Hub hau erantzuteko eraikita dagoen alderaketa-bilaketak.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Kopia-tranpa sotila da. Ez da beti tranpa egitea bezala sentitzen. Batzuetan eraginkorra izatea bezala sentitzen da. AIak zerbait ederki azaltzen du, zuk baietz egiten duzu, eta aurrera egiten duzu. Hamar minutu geroago ezin duzu ideia erantzuna aurrean izan gabe berriro sortu.

entries.source: The current inspirlearning.com rebuild.
entries.value: Egungo inspirlearning.com berreraikuntza.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Eztabaidak estilo publikoa eta mundu-ikuspegia erabiltzen ditu, sinesmen pribatuak ezagutzen dituela itxuratu gabe.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Aldea nola erabiltzen duzun da.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: AI tutore baten bertsiorik errazena erantzun landuak ematen dituen kutxa bat da. Batzuetan erabilgarria da, baina ez da nahikoa. Erantzunak bakarrik jasotzen dituen ikasleak orria amaituta eta trebetasuna aldatu gabe utz dezake.

entries.source: The exam route links planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, and motivation so learners do not confuse rereading with readiness.
entries.value: Azterketa-ibilbideak plangintza, galdetegiak, ikasketa-txartelak, berrikuspen tartekatua eta motibazioa lotzen ditu, ikasleek berrirakurtzea prest egotearekin nahas ez dezaten.

entries.source: The fastest route from search intent to learning action.
entries.value: Bilaketa-asmoetatik ikaskuntza-ekintzara doan biderik azkarrena.

entries.source: The fastest way back is to start a public learning mode, browse the mode directory, or read a guide that links into the live chat experience.
entries.value: Balioa lortzeko biderik azkarrena modu publiko bat hastea, moduen direktorioa arakatzea edo txat biziaren esperientziara lotzen duen gida bat irakurtzea da.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Art Appreciation Guide is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide-tik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Career Explorer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Career Explorer-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Case Study Simulator is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Case Study Simulator-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.
